creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Created attachment 171431
Patch to update

Summary:
NSD 3 no longer has support, this ended last month.  This release
contains bug fixes accrued before that.

(Maintainer: Upped the EXPIRE date because of these security fixes)

BUG FIXES:
- Fix for openssl 1.1.0, HMAC_CTX size not exported from openssl.
  (Same as 4.1.10).
- Fix for NSEC3 with zone signed without exact match for empty
  nonterminals, the answer for that domain gets closest encloser.
  (Same as 4.1.10).
